response.overview: When I was a college kid, Peter Valentine agreed to make a video with me about M.I.T.'s years long effort to evict him from his house. When I finished the video, Peter said he liked it, but he didn't approve of the ending. "It sounds like the cops are coming to haul me away," he said. The thing is, Peter had no intention of leaving that house. And he never did.
response.title: Our One
